notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

CP00-034 is a metadata-only Audit hint precheck pack: it accepts only RP00.P02.M07.S05 Test And Golden Case Set Permission precheck results, requires allow_metadata_only with a fixed metadata audit_event_ref, and rejects audit bypass, audit writes, runtime permission, AuthZ evaluator, permission engine, security trimming, test execution, golden fixture generation or persistence, runtime route, service execution, database/storage/product-state write, real-data/secret, catalog mutation, unit-test-contract mutation, source completion, and unknown truthy claims.
A preliminary RP00 validation run before evidence creation failed only because docs/closeout-packs/cp00-034 evidence files did not exist yet.

The completed read-only Claude run is the single valid pack-level review for CP00-034; raw verdict was request_changes, raw findings were P0=0/P1=1/P2=1/P3=1, and the P1/P2 items were resolved by creating pack evidence and correcting requiredClosedSubphases to stop at S05 while currentContractSubphaseId remains S06.

evidence_summary.implementation: RP00.P02.M07.S06 Audit hint result fields, policy, prechecker, service function, validators, fixture mirror, README entry, contract ledger row, and RP00 validator coverage were added.
evidence_summary.tests: Control-plane service tests include policy binding, metadata audit hint allow receipt, unsafe claim fail-closed coverage, prechecker no-write handoff, wrong source rejection, and fixture mirror checks.
evidence_summary.hermes_evidence: H00 command ids rp00_control_plane_contract_validate and spec_requirement_validate are represented in the final command evidence.
evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: C00 actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review completed once before production_ready; raw blocking findings were resolved/adjudicated before final gates.
evidence_summary.human_approval_boundary: Human approval remains outside this metadata-only S06 Audit hint precheck pack; the explicit next goal boundary is RP00.P02.M07.S07 Primary happy path.

preliminary_expected_failures.summary: Pre-evidence RP00 validation failed only because docs/closeout-packs/cp00-034 evidence files did not exist yet.

commands.command: claude --no-session-persistence -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode bypassPermissions --system-prompt "read-only pack-level code reviewer" --output-format json --max-budget-usd 5
commands.summary: Single valid pack-level read-only review completed; raw verdict request_changes, raw findings P0=0/P1=1/P2=1/P3=1, unresolved after fixes/adjudication P0=0/P1=0/P2=0.
Final Closeout Pack validation passed for CP00-001 through CP00-034.
Full test suite passed after CP00-034.
RP00 control-plane contract validation passed for RP00.P02.M07.S06 after CP00-034 evidence finalization and requiredClosedSubphases correction.
